content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Encode and Decode Strings". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a delimiter to separate the length of each string and the string itself
solution.timeComplexity: O(N * M) where N is the number of strings and M is the maximum length of a string
solution.spaceComplexity: O(N * M) where N is the number of strings and M is the maximum length of a string
